title: Pokemon Hypixel Sky Block
description: Changes some things to a Pokemon Texture. Needs Firmament (for Hypixel Skyblock) to display it correctly. :)
body:
**Disclaimer: It needs Firmament to display the Textures correctly (for Hypixel SkyBlock) https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament**

1.8.9 Version will be out shortly after the aproval of this Texturepack


# What is this Texturepack / what does it change in the Game?


**This Texturepack is just a funny addition to the game, you dont really need it but its funny to have tbh.**

**It changes the (Small and Medium sized) Black holes in Hypixel Skyblock to pokeballs (Normal and Superball), because i think a pokeball suits the job of capturing Mobs better than a black Hole**

![Without the TexturePack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1934325848011253e343113632e2863f569e1fbd.png)
![With the TexturePack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e724e2cf50bbf5000062d63d8b75a5f12d84e6.png)


**This is the comparason between the Black Hole without the Texturepack (Left Side) and with the Texturepack (Right side)**

**And now (thanks for the Idea SpoonerParker) it changes the Jerry Pet to DITTO :D**

![Without the Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2766710f5b81fd1ed0d73fb8471ab7ecbda19b1.png)
![With the Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e1a4f35b7889b4fe9a3bc9daf99fe954cca4fc7.png)

_I know theyre centered weird but i dont know why that ocurrs sorry xd_


# Installation Guide
**If you are on the Modrinth app you can just add it to your Instance**

**If not there are 2 ways to do it**

**Open minecraft and under Options press the Resource Pack button and drag and drop it into there. This works for every launcher. The a bit more Difficult way is to press Windows + r, type in %appdata%, go to .minecraft and in there search the folder Resource Pack and drag and drop it into there.**

**It should be simular, if not the same, on Mac Os and Linux. exept the "Windows + r" thing.**

#Hardware Compatibility

**As is just changes two textures, it should be compatible on every Computer. i still have to test it on Mac Os and Linux**

# How to Report Issues

**i do not have a Website or so, so sorry for that, but you can hit me up on Discord. My Username is Villager236#0 . I am working on a Discord Server right now, ill edit the Description after its finished.**

**Here is a list of known Issues:**
- The Orb does not change in Texutre (_i sadly cannot change that because Hypixel :sadge:_)
- Ditto wont copy other Pokemons (dont ask me why. I dont know either)


_I personally painted the Textures in this Texturepack. I dont care about the License Stuff, its free Advertisement at this point tbh..._
_Thats the same for Copyright and stuff, the Pokeball is copyrighted. Its just a mess tbh..._
_Because stuff like Cobblemon, Pokemon Elysium etc exists on Modrinth, i think this texturepack is fine with the Legal things._
